---
title: "Biomarker Diagnostic Accuracy"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Biomarker Diagnostic Accuracy}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(ggpower)
```

Power for validating sensitivity and specificity of a diagnostic classifier.

## Formula

Separate binomial tests; reported power is $\min(\text{Power}_{\text{sens}}, \text{Power}_{\text{spec}})$.

## Post hoc

```{r example}
power_compute("diagnostic_acc", "post_hoc", sensitivity = 0.85, specificity = 0.85,
              n_pos = 50, n_neg = 50, alpha = 0.05)
```

## A priori

```{r apriori}
power_compute("diagnostic_acc", "a_priori", sensitivity = 0.9, specificity = 0.9,
              alpha = 0.05, power = 0.8, allocation_ratio = 1)
```

## Related

- [ROC / AUC](biomarker-roc-auc.html)
- [Formula reference](formula-reference.html)
